---
id: codespaces-service-open-remote-access
title: "Open remote access"
description: "Establishes remote access (SSH/VNC) for a running session. Call this when the session status is 'running' (main stage running)."
sidebar_label: "Open remote access"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-rde-api/api-reference/bitrise-remote-dev-environments-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Open remote access"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/workspaces/{workspaceId}/sessions/{sessionId}/open-remote-access"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Establishes remote access (SSH/VNC) for a running session. Call this when the session status is "running" (main stage running).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
